journal_entry.description: Acquisition of offshore marine structure with asset retirement obligation
journal_entry.rationale: The marine structure is recorded at cost ($4,000,000) plus the present value of the asset retirement obligation ($1,950,000), for a total capitalized cost of $5,950,000. Under IAS 16/IFRS and ASPE 3110, the present value of estimated decommissioning/restoration costs must be capitalized as part of the asset cost and a corresponding liability recognized. The structure increases Property, Plant & Equipment, the ARO increases liabilities, and Accounts Payable increases for the purchase price owing.

lines.account_name: Property, Plant and Equipment - Marine Structure

output_debit_classifier.reason: Under Canadian GAAP (ASPE 3110) and IFRS (IAS 16/IFRIC 1), when an asset is acquired with a legal/constructive obligation for future restoration, the present value of the restoration cost must be added to the asset's cost and recognized as a liability (Asset Retirement Obligation). The structure asset increases by $5,950,000 (purchase price + PV of ARO), accounts payable increases by $4,000,000 (amount owed for purchase), and ARO liability increases by $1,950,000. Two asset increases on debit side, two liability increases on credit side.
